title: Parity Evidence
description: Machine-readable evidence artifact from parity validation runs.

runner.description: Path to the runner script that produced this evidence.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the run completed.

overall.description: Aggregate outcome of the parity run.

steps.description: Ordered results for each step in the parity command chain.

name.description: Step identifier matching the canonical command chain.

durationMs.description: Wall-clock duration of this step in milliseconds.

error.description: First 500 characters of stderr on failure. Absent on pass.
